title: Chinese Buddhist: Eihei Koroku (Dogen Records) (2)
description: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Eihei Koroku (Dogen Records)
introduction: From the Chinese Buddhist canon: Eihei Koroku (Dogen Records)

translation.text: From Eihei Koroku (Dogen Records): A core text of Chinese Buddhism, transmitted through the great translation period and forming the basis of East Asian Buddhist practice.
